items.name: string — lowercase-hyphenated, from package manifest
items.root_path: string — relative path to root within repo
items.language: string — typescript, python, go, rust, java, yaml, etc.
exposes: string — format depends on type (see prompt)

items.target: string — name of called service/library (can be external)
items.protocol: rest | grpc | kafka | rabbitmq | internal | sdk | k8s | tf | helm
items.method: string — GET/POST/etc, produce, consume, import, call, deploy, configure
items.path: string — format depends on protocol (see prompt)
items.target_file: string | null — file:function in callee (null if unknown)
items.evidence: string — exact code snippet (≤ 3 lines) proving this connection
